microsoft_ft: Partnered with enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) as a **technical bridge** between product and IT organizations, scaling Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and driving

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by **30%** and enabled a scalable, repeatable execution model across enterprise-scale deployments.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation framework adopted across sovereign-cloud environments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under C-level executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, translating complex technical requirements into clear stakeholder narratives.

Conducted discovery workshops with enterprise IT and engineering stakeholders to scope integration and security requirements, synthesizing findings into comprehensive technical solution recommendations that aligned platform capabilities to customer business objectives.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to reduce planning cycle time by **39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, demonstrating consultative ownership of a fast-evolving product domain.
microsoft_2023: Championed **enterprise adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, delivering hands-on product demos and training sessions across 14 key Azure service teams — a pre-sales-style motion that drove sustained utilization and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and delivering structured feedback to the product organization — mirroring a solutions engineering feedback loop.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval speed for enterprise users by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by **83%** and improving the self-service experience for technical stakeholders.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, translating complex technical tradeoffs into a compelling business case for C-level sponsors.

Conducted structured discovery with 20+ enterprise service teams to map **81 hours of manual operational toil** per region launch, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical paths — a consultative scoping motion directly analogous to pre-sales solution design.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and drive high-impact investment decisions by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, turning raw process data into clear, executive-ready insights for strategic prioritization.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, coordinating technical and business requirements across IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process — maintaining delivery velocity in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by **25%** and reducing integration friction for enterprise-scale robotics deployments.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM process, building repeatable sales operations that mirrored enterprise pre-sales discovery and **solution scoping** motions.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to align messaging with customer pain points and decision criteria.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify and seal margin leaks, delivering data-driven recommendations that directly shaped strategic business decisions.
